ddt:Target.Name: EMM2_T4_VS_DDT_SW5_V3
ddt:Target.Description:
The DDT 2000 file is auto generated by Power tool. (DEASIC4/65692/UET Modélisation BCM)
2009.09.30 - Creation

Data.Name: Cxx_RLSCOM_FAILURE_FILTER_TM_TP
Data.Comment: RLS communication confirmation time before enabling the limp home of the EMM-RLSS communication

Item.Text: Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit High
Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit Low
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Low
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Range/Performance
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit High
signal has too few transitions / events
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
signal has too many transitions / events
circuit short to battery or open
circuit short to ground or open
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding/ General Failure Information
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: LVL_CFG_CF
Data.Comment: "0: No Levelling function 1: Levelling function with one rear sensor ; w/o front sensor 2:Levelling function with two sensors (ft and rr) 3: Levelling function with manual switch >3: No Levelling function 255: Levelling Disable"

Data.Name: Nbx_basic_PWM_adaptation_DRL_CF
Data.Comment: [Units:="-", Resolution:=1 x.0.1%, Minimum:=0, Maximum:=1000, Description:="adjust the luminous flux of DRL (0-100%)"]

Data.Name: Nbx_CANADIAN_CF
Data.Comment: [Units:="-", Resolution:=1, Minimum:=0, Maximum:=1, Description:="Canadian lowbeam configuration"]
